---
title: "Nom de l'événement"
date: "2025-03-15"
date_fin: "2025-03-17"       # si multi-jours
type: conference              # conference | meetup | hackathon | webinaire | bootcamp
lieu: "Abidjan, CI"          # ou "Online"
pays: "🇨🇮"
url: "https://..."
excerpt: "Description courte."
gratuit: true
listing: false
---
